caption: A football game is played in a large stadium with a green field marked with white yardage lines and numbers like "30", "40", and "50". Players in white uniforms and players in dark uniforms are spread across the field. A scoreboard at the top shows "1st & 10", "6", "0", and a game clock at "0:18" which changes to "0:17" as the action progresses. The words "ULTIMATE TEAR" and logos for the NFL and a team are visible. A small inset window shows a man with blond hair looking surprised. In the initial scenes, a player in a dark uniform runs toward the left side of the field. As the sequence continues, the camera angle shifts to a side view where players in white and dark uniforms converge. A player in a white uniform is tackled by a player in a dark uniform, with labels "Smith" and "Dinka" appearing beneath them.
